folder_role: This folder owns the configuration constants for the code-graph MCP server, specifically the database directory resolution and initialization.

file_inventory.role: Defines and exports the DATABASE_DIR constant, resolving it from environment variable or default path and ensuring the directory exists.

architecture_observation: This is a minimal configuration module that resolves the database directory from environment variables or defaults, creating the directory if needed. It has no dependencies on other core modules and serves as a foundational configuration layer for the MCP server.

public_entrypoints.name: DATABASE_DIR
public_entrypoints.purpose: Provides the absolute path to the code-graph database directory, used by vector index and session manager modules.

integration_notes: This module is imported by other MCP server modules that need to know the database location, particularly the vector index and session manager initialization code.
key_invariants: DATABASE_DIR is always a valid, existing directory after module load
Environment variable SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_DB_DIR takes precedence over default path
